chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2601 of 2019 Muhammad Hussain & others Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability. Dated: 28.02.2025 Mr. Naveed Ali, associate of Mr. M. Adeel Awan, advocate for Petitioners. -.-.- Mr. Naveed Ali, associate of Mr. M. Adeel Awan, advocate for Petitioners, states that on instructions he does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications with no orders as to costs. Judge Judge
